deterministic.engagement_rationale: 13 signals in the last 30 days from 5 contacts.

llm_produced.narrative: Engagement is medium with 13 signals from 5 contacts over the past 30 days, though product usage is concentrated entirely in Alex Anderson, who accounts for all eight product events — spanning dashboard views, report generation, integration connection (May 5), and a workspace creation (May 8) — while the other four contacts contributed exclusively through email. Sentiment is strongly positive: multiple stakeholders have expressed clear expansion intent, including Quinn Williams (Apr 16, 'Webhook configuration') requesting rollout to additional teams, Avery Davis (Apr 17, 'Re: contract renewal') signaling org-wide readiness, Morgan Miller (Apr 22, 'Compliance requirements') formally initiating an expansion discussion citing pilot results exceeding expectations, and Blake Thomas (Apr 24, 'Re: integration setup') requesting an executive briefing for the next deployment phase. A notable concern is that several of Alex Anderson's product events show plan=free, which may indicate the account is not yet on a tier that supports the scale of deployment being discussed. Whether any of the enthusiastic expansion conversations have progressed into formal procurement or budget approval is unknown.
